data.title: Significant COMP Transfer to Wintermute Observed
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, Arkham data reveals that at 00:21 and 00:24, a total of 252,000 COMP tokens, valued at approximately $8.73 million, were transferred from an anonymous address starting with 0x2573 to Wintermute.

At 00:21, 106,000 COMP tokens, worth around $3.6761 million, were moved to Wintermute. Subsequently, at 00:24, an additional 146,000.03411223 COMP tokens, valued at about $5.0545 million, were transferred to the same destination.

data.title: When Fiat Fails, Crypto Fills the Gap – Argentina Proves It
data.description:
With triple-digit inflation and broken trust in banks, stablecoins and Bitcoin are powering daily life in ways the formal economy can’t.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/12/04/when-fiat-fails-crypto-fills-the-gap-argentina-proves-it/

data.title: CFTC greenlights spot crypto trading on US exchanges
data.description:
Acting CFTC Chair Caroline Pham said the move was intended to drive trading activity to US exchanges, rather than offshore ones “that lack basic safeguards. ”
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/cftc-spot-crypto-trading-exchanges?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fttt%3D1764865648603%26nc%3D1764865648603%26_rnd%3Dim3otg&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Meta weighs deep reductions to metaverse unit while sector’s crypto tokens collapse: report
data.description:
Metaverse-linked crypto assets have collapsed from early-2025 peaks, a sign that the virtual-world narrative has largely lost steam.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/381384/meta-reductions-metaverse-unit-sectors-crypto-tokens-collapse?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Kraken and Deutsche Borse strike partnership to link traditional and digital markets
data.description:
Kraken and Deutsche Börse Group announced a collaboration to create a two-way bridge between traditional market infrastructure and crypto-native platforms.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/381392/kraken-deutsche-borse-partnership-link-traditional-and-digital-markets?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Kraken and Deutsche Börse join effort in TradFi, crypto expansion
data.description:
Kraken and Deutsche Börse are expanding their shared ambition to bridge traditional financial markets with the digital-asset economy through a multi-layered partnership built on regulated infrastructure, tokenization capabilities, and institutional market access. The program builds on Deutsche Börse’s acquisition of a majority stake in Crypto Finance, a FINMA-regulated provider of trading, custody, and investment services […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kraken-deutsche-borse-join-effort/

data.title: Russia’s VTB Bank Prepares to Launch Direct Crypto Trading in 2026
data.description:
Russia’s second-largest bank, VTB Bank, is preparing to offer direct cryptocurrency trading services in 2026, marking one of the most significant steps toward mainstream digital-asset adoption within the country’s financial system. The rollout depends on final approval from Russian regulators, who have signaled that the authorization is likely to arrive within the coming months.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/russias-vtb-bank-prepares-to-launch-direct-crypto-trading-in-2026/

data.title: Significant Transfer of H Tokens to Exchange Observed
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, monitoring by onchainschool.pro has revealed ongoing deposit activities involving H tokens from wallets that had previously been accumulating and withdrawing these tokens from exchanges.

Within a 30-minute timeframe, two wallets transferred additional H tokens valued at $6.4 million to an exchange. These tokens are currently held in the exchange's deposit address.

data.title: Michael Burry Renews His Harsh Bitcoin Critique, Calling It “Worth Nothing”
data.description:
Michael Burry, the investor known for predicting the 2008 financial crisis and portrayed in The Big Short, has resurfaced with a fresh round of criticism aimed squarely at Bitcoin.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/michael-burry-renews-his-harsh-bitcoin-critique-calling-it-worth-nothing/

data.title: XRP Velocity Hits Record Levels as On-Chain Activity Surges in 2025
data.description:
The XRP Ledger has entered one of its most active periods of the year, with new data from CryptoQuant showing a record-breaking spike in circulation velocity, a sign that XRP is moving between wallets at a pace not seen in 2025.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xrp-velocity-hits-record-levels-as-on-chain-activity-surges-in-2025/

data.title: 75% Chance Crypto Is ‘Crossing The Chasm’ Now, Says Moonrock Capital Boss
data.description:
Moonrock Capital founder Simon Dedic says the crypto industry is nearing a decisive transition from an early-adopter niche to a mainstream market, assigning a 75% probability that the sector will “finish crossing the chasm and enter the early-majority phase next year. ” Is The Crypto Market Crossing The Chasm? Dedic frames his outlook using the classic technology adoption curve, which splits the market into innovators (2. 5%), early adopters (13. 5%), an early majority (34%), late majority (34%) and laggards (16%)
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/75-chance-crypto-crossing-the-chasm-moonrock-capital/

data.title: Bitcoin Near $92K Steadies Market as Curve, Bittensor and Avalanche Lead Altcoin Rotation
data.description:
Sentiment continues to ease after last week’s extreme fear, with the Fear and Greed Index climbing to 27 and moving the market further away from the intense stress that defined recent sessions. Bitcoin is trading near $92,000 with steadier ranges and lower liquidation pressure, which improves conditions across major spot venues and reduces the abrupt volatility […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/altcoin-season-shows-early-signs-of-stability-as-fear-index-rises-to-27/

data.title: CFTC Allows Trading of Spot Cryptocurrencies on Registered Exchanges
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has announced that spot cryptocurrencies can now be traded on exchanges registered with the CFTC.
